_notice: Remaining global CO2 budgets from 2025, derived from IPCC AR6 WG1 SPM Table SPM.2 ('Estimates of remaining carbon budgets from the beginning of 2020', Climate Change 2021: The Physical Science Basis, IPCC, 2021), adjusted by -200 Gt CO2 for cumulative 2020-2024 emissions per Global Carbon Budget 2024 (Friedlingstein et al. 2024, Earth System Science Data, 16, 2625-2659, https://doi.org/10.5194/essd-16-2625-2024). Values follow IPCC Table SPM.2 rounding convention (nearest 50 GtCO2); the 200 Gt deduction is itself rounded from the GCB 2024 ~209-225 Gt range at AR6 granularity for citation-chain consistency. All four `original_gt_from_2020` values verified against AR6 SPM Table SPM.2 published values as of Patch X1++ (cross-checked against Climate Brink's Hausfather 2023 comparison of AR6 vs Forster 2023 budgets, and the AR6CarbonBudgetCalc reference implementation; see sources[]). Values flagged provisional pending pre-publication refresh against the latest IPCC synthesis.

sources.citation: IPCC, 2021: Climate Change 2021: The Physical Science Basis. Contribution of Working Group I to the Sixth Assessment Report of the Intergovernmental Panel on Climate Change. Cambridge University Press.
Friedlingstein, P., et al. (2024). Global Carbon Budget 2024. Earth System Science Data, 16, 2625-2659.
Lamboll, R., AR6CarbonBudgetCalc — Reference implementation for AR6 WG1 Table SPM.2 / Table 5.8 / Table TS.3.
Hausfather, Z. (2023). The remaining carbon budget for 1.5C and 2C is getting smaller. The Climate Brink. Cross-check reference for AR6 vs Forster 2023 budget comparison.

options.name: IPCC AR6 — 1.5°C, 50th percentile
options.source: IPCC AR6 WG1 Table SPM.2 (500 Gt from 2020, -200 Gt 2020-2024 = 300 Gt remaining; AR6 50 Gt rounding convention)

options.name: IPCC AR6 — 1.5°C, 67th percentile
options.source: IPCC AR6 WG1 Table SPM.2 (400 Gt from 2020, -200 Gt 2020-2024 = 200 Gt remaining; AR6 50 Gt rounding convention)

options.name: IPCC AR6 — 2.0°C, 50th percentile
options.source: IPCC AR6 WG1 Table SPM.2 (1350 Gt from 2020, -200 Gt 2020-2024 = 1150 Gt remaining; AR6 50 Gt rounding convention)

options.name: IPCC AR6 — 2.0°C, 67th percentile
options.source: IPCC AR6 WG1 Table SPM.2 (1150 Gt from 2020, -200 Gt 2020-2024 = 950 Gt remaining; AR6 50 Gt rounding convention)
